items.title: 🛠 Senior Back-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Back-End Engineer, your pivotal role will encompass the design of a dynamic and scalable back-end architecture optimized for performance, and positioned to accommodate future product developments.

## **Your Journey as a Back-End Engineer**

- Our back-end primarily leverages **TypeScript (Node.js)**.
    - Proficiency in TypeScript is vital
    - However, applicants with experience in other languages like C, C++, C#, Java, Ruby, or GoLang, who can adapt to TypeScript swiftly, are welcomed.
- Our databases are SQL-based, primarily utilizing Postgres. We use ORMs for effective database interaction and management.
- Our production infrastructure thrives on containers, K8, and AWS ECS.
- Our work environment values teamwork.
    - Join hands with a cross-functional team throughout the development cycle, from designing to deploying APIs, SDKs, and other services or tooling.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Craft reusable and testable code for services and libraries that can be maintained seamlessly.
    - Collaborate with engineers across various departments to create remarkable features.
    - Work in unison with our product team to identify and tackle user pain points.
    - Champion improvements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop innovative tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and responsibility for your work.
- API development is a key facet of your role.
    - Design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and systems.
    - Create new APIs or enhance existing ones for our users.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the launch of new markets, features, or products regularly.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or an internship in a similar role.
3. Proficiency in web frameworks, especially JavaScript and Node.js.
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

In this role, you'll have the opportunity to shape the backbone of our software, empowering us to drive forward with innovative product advancements. Are you ready to take the lead?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: 🛠 Senior Full-Stack Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Full Stack Engineer, you'll be key to building and maintaining our innovative web applications, working across both front-end and back-end to ensure a robust, seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Full-Stack Engineer**

1. Work with our tech stack comprising JavaScript, React, Material UI (MUI), Node.js, and other languages, while swiftly adapting to JavaScript if your expertise lies elsewhere.
2. Handle SQL-based databases, mainly PostgreSQL, using ORMs to interact effectively.
3. Utilize containers, K8, and AWS ECS for reliable and efficient application deployment.
4. Develop mobile interfaces using React Native.
5. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams through the full development cycle, from API design to deployment. This includes code reviews, developing reusable code, and collaborating with various engineering teams.
6. Work with our design team to address user pain points and drive improvements in engineering standards and processes. You'll also develop new tools for internal teams and take ownership of your work.
7. Design, build, and maintain APIs, iterating to enhance functionality.
8. Troubleshoot and debug software systems, integrate new components as needed, and address production issues.
9. Launch new markets, features, or products regularly, staying agile to meet market demands.

## **What You Bring**

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degrees preferred.
2. Proficiency in front-end technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and a modern framework such as React.
3. Solid understanding of back-end development using Node.js, Python, or similar.
4. Experience with PostgreSQL and SQL Server databases, including data modeling and query optimization.
5. Familiarity with version control systems (Git), agile methodologies, and CI/CD pipelines.
6. Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.
7. Excellent problem-solving skills with an ability to debug complex software issues.
8. Strong communication and collaboration skills with a team-oriented mindset.

By joining us, you'll not only be a part of a dynamic, innovative environment, but you'll also have the opportunity to grow your technical skills, contribute directly to the success of our projects, and make a tangible impact in our rapidly evolving field. Our inclusive culture encourages collaboration and continuous learning, ensuring that you stay abreast of the latest trends and technologies, broadening your professional horizons, and furthering your career.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: 🛠 Senior Front-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As our Front-End Engineer, you are tasked with the development of engaging, intuitive, and visually compelling user interfaces for our web app product. You will work in close collaboration with designers and back-end engineers, and the marketing team, transmuting design mockups, user stories, and wireframes into high-quality code, thereby ensuring an immersive and seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Front-End Engineer**

- Our front-end ecosystem is fortified with **TypeScript.**
    - React, and Material UI (MUI)
    - React Native for mobile front-end development.
- As front-end engineers, we take pride in precise design execution, valuing pixel-perfect implementation and employing Figma to maintain alignment with original designs.
- Collaborative work culture is our ethos.
    - Work in tandem with a cross-functional team through the development cycle, from front-end frameworks, and front-end service design to deployment.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Write clean, reusable, and testable code for easy maintenance by yourself and your fellow software engineers.
    - Partner with engineers from various teams to create user-delighting features.
    - Collaborate with our design team to understand and address user pain points.
    - Drive enhancements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop new tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and accountability for your work.
- API integration is a critical part of your role.
    - Integrate APIs according to spec with front-end frameworks.
- Build, mange, and reuse UI components effectively.
    - Keep UI components organized.
    - Reuse UI component to maximize efficiency, robustness, and user experience.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the regular launch of new markets, features, or products.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or a similar role internship.
3. Proficiency in web development frameworks, especially JavaScript, React, and Material UI (MUI).
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

With your craftsmanship, you'll help to shape the user interface of our software, driving our mission forward through stunning visual experiences. Are you ready to create?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: [Remoto] Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) com o pop-up personalizado de candidatura. 👋

Fala galera, blz?

Temos 2 vagas para Fullstack Developer.

Não procuramos especialista em uma linguagem de programação. Precisamos de pessoas que saibam resolver o problema do cliente. Muitas vezes o cliente nos passa uma informação de uma forma, mas precisamos nos colocar no lugar do cliente para conseguir entender, e pensar em uma forma em que pode ser até melhor do que ele nos propôs. 

Logo, a capacidade em resolver problemas é muito importante. Não basta só sabermos programar, precisamos saber como cada funcionalidade pode impactar na vida do usuário. Precisamos saber um pouquinho de cada coisa, isso aí é um diferencial.

Somos uma pequena empresa, que está engatinhando no mercado, mas temos ajudado milhares de usuários a crescer, de forma que desenvolvemos ferramentas que facilitam o dia a dia de muitos. Nossos produtos são baratos, queremos ajudar muitos clientes, e ganhar no volume de vendas.

Então você precisará saber um pouquinho de cada coisa: Flutter, Figma (UX/UI), Java e Spring Framework, React.js e Next.js.

  • O formato de horário está Full Time, mas podemos avaliar em outros formatos (4h e 6h).
  • Informe sua pretenção salarial, pois também é um fator determinante.
  • Responda o máximo de perguntas e testes que puder! Seja sincero e não cole!
## TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA:

Temos um aplicativo "carro chefe", que é o Tua Agenda!

Aplicativo muito usado em salões de beleza e afins.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Preact - PostgreSQL - Figma ## Local: 100% Remoto ## Requisitos: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Figma ## Diferenciais: - React - Next.js - Node - iReport ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack

items.title: [REMOTE] Consulting Architect - Middleware - Red Hat
items.description:
## About the job

The Red Hat Consulting team is looking for a Consulting Architect - Middleware to join us, Brazil. You will be responsible for translating the client’s business
requirements into specific systems, applications or process designs for very large complex
technology solutions and integrating architecture. Acts as an advocate for the client as the
ultimate authority on the architecture designed to address client business problems.
Provides direction for design activities. Often project-based, sometimes working at
customer sites. You'll collaborate with the broader Sales and Technical Delivery teams to
bring our customers solutions that improve the Red Hat Middleware suite including J2E
runtimes, business rules, business process management, enterprise messaging, data
virtualization, Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), cloud computing, Red Hat OpenShift, 3scale
by Red Hat, and more. As a Consulting Architects - Middleware, you’ll work hand-in-hand with the account team, clients, and consultants to ensure their architectural visions are
communicated and delivered effectively. They focus on open source technologies and must
be intimately familiar with Red Hat's product offerings, while also conversant in the wider
landscape of both complementing and competing products and technologies. They have
the ability to motivate and influence groups, whether the members of the group have an
affinity for Red Hat products and services or not. Consulting Architects are expected to
divide their time between project delivery, non-billable internal initiatives, and presales
activities.

## What you will do

* Able to build, design, and present complex solutions to customers.
* Provide project and technical leadership to multiple complex projects utilizing standard project methodologies and resource management.
* Plays a key role in managing client expectations.
* Defines goals and tasks for delivery teams in a project as a solution lead.
* Collaborate with product teams and the Product Engineering, Professional Services, and Sales teams to ensure excellent customer experience with our offerings and solutions.
* Serve as a trusted subject matter expert for the customers, gain the trust of IT professionals, and build long-lasting relationships within our key accounts.

## What you will bring
* Bachelor's degree required; master's degree in computer science, engineering or MBA
* 8+ years of experience in consulting services
* 3+ years of enterprise architecture experience
* Proven architecture experience using cloud-native development, Kubernetes, agile integration, and development, continuous integration (CI), test-driven development (TDD), service-oriented architecture (SOA), message-oriented middleware (MOM), Identity and Access Management, governance, high availability, scaling, distributed applications, clustering, etc.
* Experience with Java development technologies like Spring Boot, WildFly Swarm, or JEE, including Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform (JBoss EAP), WildFly, Oracle WebLogic, or IBM WebSphere.
* Familiarity with Java development frameworks like Spring, Netflix OSS, Eclipse Vert.x, or Play and other technologies like Node.js, Ruby, PHP, Go, or .NET.
* Solid verbal and written communication skills and interpersonal skills.
* Strong facilitation skills.
* Ability to manage both time and workload independently.
* Expert in designing implementation solutions to deliver expected business outcomes applying application and technology capabilities.
* Knowledge of software development lifecycle practices, including Agile (e.g. Scrum), Waterfall, and Incremental. 
* Fluency in English is mandatory.
* Willingness to travel up to 50%

*The following are considered a plus:*
* Experience with Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform, Red Hat Fuse, 3scale by Red Hat, and Red Hat OpenShift.
* Knowledge of the Red Hat Middleware portfolio.
* Fluency in Spanish.

items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/flutter-mobile-juniorpleno-151529578?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) com o pop-up personalizado de candidatura. 👋

Estamos procurando uma pessoa com experiência em desenvolvimento Flutter para se juntar à equipe da Net Imoveis!

Responsabilidades:

  • Desenvolver e manter nossos aplicativos em Flutter;
  • Trabalhar em estreita colaboração com a equipe de design para criar interfaces de usuário atraentes e fáceis de usar;
  • Garantir que nossos aplicativos sejam de alta qualidade, seguros e escaláveis;
  • Identificar e corrigir bugs e problemas de desempenho;
  • Manter-se atualizado sobre as tendências e tecnologias mais recentes em desenvolvimento de aplicativos móveis.

## Netimóveis Brasil:

Há mais de 27 anos trabalhamos para ajudar você em um momento muito importante: a procura de um lar ideal. Para isso contamos com mais de 150 imobiliárias associadas espalhadas pelo Brasil, além de uma unidade em Portugal, fruto da expansão internacional iniciada no último ano.

Somos um dos maiores portais imobiliários do país, com mais de 100 mil imóveis qualificados e sem repetição. Na Netimóveis você vende, aluga e compra o seu imóvel com muito mais segurança e agilidade.

## Habilidades: - Flutter - Design Patterns - Code Review - Dart ## Local: 100% Remoto ## Requisitos: - Experiência com desenvolvimento Flutter; - Conhecimentos sólidos em estruturas de dados, algoritmos, design patterns e arquitetura de sistemas; - Experiência em boas práticas de engenharia de software, lint, testes unitários e code reviews. ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Flutter Mobile (Júnior/Pleno) na Netimóveis Brasil](https://coodesh.com/jobs/flutter-mobile-juniorpleno-151529578?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Mobile

items.description:
Content Delivery Network 業務

職稱
Node.JS後端工程師(遠程工作)

薪資範圍
美金 $3000-4500

職位描述
1.負責公司業務系統Node.JS後端代碼的研發與維護
2.獨立完成專案的系統分析、設計，並主導完成詳細設計和編碼的任務，確保專案的進度和品質 
3.靈活支撐業務的同時，對於系統容量、穩定性等有較為深厚的理解。

職位要求
1.扎實的Node.JS相關技術背景
2.熟悉egg.js框架
3.熟悉微服務相關技術，或者瞭解Service Mesh相關技術
4.熟練MySQL，對資料庫有較強的設計能力
5.具有基於資料庫、緩存、分散式存儲開發高性能、高可用系統的設計開發的開發經驗
6.具有高度的責任心與自驅力，良好的溝通協作、應急回應與處理問題的能力
7.具備良好的識別和設計通用框架及模組的能力，有跨平臺的API規範設計以及API高效調用設計能力。

能力要求：
1.工作經驗：2年以上佳
2.學歷要求：大學或以上
3.科系要求：資訊相關科系佳

歡迎聯繫Lucas或直接投遞簡歷
Email：[lucas@marsconsult.com.tw](mailto:lucas@marsconsult.com.tw)
telegram： @Mars_Lucas

items.title: [Híbrido - Porto Alegre - RS] Flutter Developer no Tribunal de Justiça do Rio Grande do Sul [TJRS]
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

**Desenvolvedor (a) Flutter Sênior (CLT) em Porto Alegre - RS**

Já pensou em trabalhar em uma das maiores empresas de Tecnologia do Brasil?
Então a Cast Group é o lugar certo para você! 😉

**🔎 O QUE BUSCAMOS:**
Profissional para atuação híbrida em Porto Alegre, com ensino superior completo em TI ou áreas afins e/ou curso técnico em áreas de TI.

**💡 CONTAMOS COM VOCÊ PARA**
Atuar com levantamento de requisitos, análise e planejamento de soluções para os requisitos levantados e prototipagem de sistemas;
Prestar apoio aos desenvolvedores e testadores através do detalhamento, especificação e diagramação de requisitos;
Conduzir projetos de desenvolvimento de novas soluções;
Realizar teste dos aplicativos e integrações;
Realizar a análise e correção de bugs;
Gerenciar o ciclo de vida do app;
Replicar telas de protótipos e implementar regras de negócio;
Realizar deploy/publicação em Google e Apple.

## Local

Modelo de Trabalho: 🧑‍💻 Híbrido (2x por semana presencial e 3x Home Office)
Porto Alegre - Rio Grande do Sul

## Benefícios Fixos

🍲 Vale-Refeição ou Vale-Alimentação
🚘 Auxílio transporte
🚑 Plano de saúde e seguro de vida

## Benefícios Flexíveis 

👩🏻‍💳 Cartão FLASH
🚴🏼‍♀️ Gympass
🦷Plano Odontológico
👨‍👩‍👦Reembolso dos custos da Educação de seus filhos, medicamentos, procedimentos estéticos, óculos e lente de contato
🏠Home Office – pague suas contas de telefone, internet e luz

#### Diferenciais

👩🏻‍🎓Aqui na Cast Group, temos Desenvolvimento para você! O Cast Inside é nossa plataforma está recheada de cursos on-line. E parceria com escola de Inglês com super desconto para colaboradores e seus familiares.

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios**
Análise de sistemas (mínimo 3 anos com qualquer linguagem de programação);
Desenvolvimento de aplicativos móveis usando Flutter/Dart (mínimo 1 ano de experiência).

## Contratação

CLT

## Como se candidatar

Por favor envie um email para jose.castellani@castgroup.com.br com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga Flutter
Ou no celular 41 3513-9112

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 07 dias após cada processo.

## Labels
- CLT
- Pleno
- Híbrido
- Sênior

items.title: [遠端] [底薪 2.1-2.9M] Circle 招募 Senior/Staff 區塊鏈工程師 (Golang)
items.description:
## 團隊簡介
我們是 [Circle](https://www.circle.com/en/)，全球第二大穩定幣 USDC 的發行商，在 2022 年併購了提供加密資產託管服務的台灣新創 CYBAVO 博歐科技。除了發行 [USDC](https://www.usdc.com/learn/what-is-usdc) 之外，我們在打造 **[Circle Payments Network](https://www.circle.com/cpn)**（CPN） 跟 [Programmable Wallet](https://developers.circle.com/w3s/programmable-wallets)，用受監管的穩定幣（像 USDC）重新定義全球資金怎麼流動。簡單說，就是讓跨境支付變得更快、更便宜、不再卡在傳統金融的種種低效。

我們台灣的工程團隊專注在兩個核心領域：

- 🔐 **Key Management**：打造更安全的私鑰管理方式，比如用 Multi-Party Computation（MPC）跟 Passkeys，來讓用戶和開發者能在不暴露私鑰的情況下安全簽署交易，又不怕弄丟或被盜。
- 💵 **Circle Payment Network**：一個全新的全球支付網路，讓 Payment Service Providers 可以透過 USDC 和 EURC，24/7 、即時完成跨境資金移動。
- 🔧 **Blockchain Infrastructure**：打造區塊鏈核心功能，例如交易廣播、區塊鏈資料索引以提升存取效率、簡化 gas fee 管理等。

我們目前在尋找區塊鏈工程師加入團隊：Circle is looking for a highly skilled and experienced Blockchain Engineer to join our dynamic team at Circle. As a Blockchain Engineer, you will play a critical role in connecting various blockchains to our wallet infrastructure and maintaining the underlying code. Your expertise will be instrumental in bridging the gap between our service and blockchain nodes, enabling seamless interaction between the two.

🔥 **應徵連結：[https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100329/Senior-Software-Engineer-Blockchain](https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100329/Senior-Software-Engineer-Blockchain)**

Circle 與 Sony 合作 ➡️ [Circle 合作索尼 L2「Soneium」將引入 USDC](https://www.blocktempo.com/circle-partners-with-sony-block-solutions-labs-to-introduce-usdc/)

Circle 與 Binance 合作 ➡️ [Circle 與幣安達成戰略合作夥伴關係 推動全球USDC和加密貨幣普及](https://www.blocktempo.com/circle-and-binance-enter-into-strategic-partnership/)

Circle 登入日本 ➡️ [USDC獲批成「日本首個合規穩定幣」，Circle 合作金融巨頭 SBI Holdings 今上架迎3大利好](https://www.blocktempo.com/usdc-becomes-japans-first-regulatory-compliant-stablecoin/)

## 工作地點
混合工作模式，可以自由選擇在家上班，或是到位於信義區的辦公室吹冷氣。
有的同事住在中南部，只有偶爾有 all-hands meeting 或是 team building 活動的時候才會上來台北！

## 工作內容

- Evaluate new blockchain technologies and their capabilities.
- Develop and validate cryptographic implementations.
- Create highly performant code that is clean, simple, maintainable, and battle-tested with test-driven development (TDD) for maximum test coverage
- Drive continuous improvement in the tech stack.

## 能力需求

- 4+ years of relevant experience 
- Expertise with cryptography, blockchain technologies, and the underlying fundamentals and mathematics.
- Technical understanding of blockchain technologies, including but not limited to BIPs, UTXO, EVM, Nakamoto Consensus, and cryptography.
- Familiar with the Golang Web Framework like Gin, Fasthttps and know the golang develop related tool like go mod, go lint, etc
- Willingness to pick up new and emerging bleeding-edge blockchain technologies
- Excellent communication skills, able to collaborate with remote teams, share ideas, and present concepts effectively.
- Extensive knowledge of secure cryptosystem operating practices is required.

## 加分能力

- Advanced degree in cryptography, computer science, mathematics, or related fields is strongly preferred.
- Experience participating or maintaining in open-source software development is highly preferred.
- Experience with writing smart contracts would be a plus.

## 面試流程

- HR 面試（約 45 分鐘）
- 線上程式測驗（約 90 分鐘）
- Technical Interview*3（60 分鐘 x 2 + 90 分鐘 x 1）
- Behavioral Interview*3 （60 分鐘 x 1 + 30 分鐘 x 2）

約一個月可以完成所有面試流程

## 薪資範圍

- Base Pay Range: NT$2,170,000 - $2,975,000（月薪：180K - 247K）
- Annual Bonus Target: 12.5-15%
- Also Included: Equity & Benefits

## 福利/推薦項

Home office 補助、每月手機費用補助、員工健康檢查補助、彈性有薪假期（基本上不限制休假天數，只要與主管達成共識即可）
（雖然是外商，但不是 EOR，有提供薪轉跟勞健保）

## 聯絡方式
🔥 **應徵連結：[https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100329/Senior-Software-Engineer](https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100329/Senior-Software-Engineer)**
Email: [riley.chang@circle.com](mailto:riley.chang@circle.com)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/riley-chang/

歡迎 LinkedIn 私訊我了解更多～

items.title: [Remoto] Mobile Flutter Developer WOW
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Somos uma empresa inovadora no setor de automação residencial. Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Mobile Flutter developer Junior, altamente talentosa e apaixonada por tecnologia para se juntar à nossa equipe e ajudar a impulsionar nossos projetos para o próximo nível.

## Local

Remoto ou Escritório São Paulo - Santana de Parnaíba

## Requisitos

- Experiência comprovada em desenvolvimento Flutter
- Experiência em integração com APIs RESTful;
- Familiaridade com ferramentas de controle de versão, como Git e Subversion;
- Habilidade para colaborar efetivamente em uma equipe multidisciplinar;
- Excelente capacidade de resolução de problemas e atenção aos detalhes;
- Compreensão de princípios de design e experiência do usuário.

## Contratação

PJ a combinar

## Nossa empresa

A WOW é uma indústria de tecnologia brasileira, com abrangência em todo território nacional. Desenvolvemos produtos e serviços para tornar espaços e ambientes mais seguros, confortáveis e eficientes. Com design, versatilidade e facilidade de instalação tendo como pilar a internet of things.

## Como se candidatar

Por favor envie um email para wow@wow.ind.br com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga Flutter

items.title: [PRESENCIAL] Desenvolvedor Java SR - Truppe
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

A [Truppe](https://truppe.team/) é uma empresa de consultoria de tecnologia com foco em desenvolver e aprimorar talentos referência em recrutamento, seleção e alocação de profissionais de TI. Criada há 4 anos, está em fase de desenvolvimento e crescimento, expandindo seu portfólio de produtos e serviços, trabalhando também com transformação e aceleração digital.

Sua missão é conectar os melhores profissionais às melhores oportunidades, proporcionando seu crescimento na carreira.

## Descrição da vaga

Buscamos uma pessoa para atuar como Desenvolvedor Java Sênior em uma empresa multinacional!

## Local

_Atuação:_ 100% Presencial (Vila Olímpia - SP).
_Horário:_ das 13h às 22h (horário de Brasília).

## Requisitos

- **Necessário inglês fluente para conversação com time norte americano.**
- Fortes habilidades práticas em Java do lado do servidor (Java 8) e proficiência com programação simultânea;
- Conhecimento profundo de JavaScript, Angular, JQuery e CSS;
- Sólida experiência com banco de dados Oracle, criação de consultas SQL;
- Experiência em Agile, Scrum;
- Experiência com IBM WebSphere.

### Nível

- Sênior

## Contratação

- CLT, tempo indeterminado.
- Pretensão salarial.

## Como se candidatar

Envie um email para **camila.gomes@truppe.team** com seu **CV em inglês atualizado** anexado, link do **perfil do Linkedin (se tiver) e pretensão salarial CLT** no corpo do email.

_Enviar no assunto:_ **Vaga Desenvolvedor Java**

items.title: think-cell - C++ Developer (f/m/d) - Berlin 🇩🇪 or Remote - 130k EUR/year
items.description:
<!--

PLEASE REVIEW RULES BEFORE POSTING:
https://github.com/TechnologyMasters/jobs/blob/master/README.md#employers

# Issue title format: [Company Name] - [Job Title] - [Location] - [Salary] [Currency]/[Frequency]

-->
Our official career page: [click here to apply](https://www.think-cell.com/career/jobs/development?ec=rC0IZep7h7pmLcx8ndavN6CYqAqwS1w6rWJ8C30Q0MQcBTL97qhrOxn34Sklr6jQNODy_edu-fd-bsHwp3MXAOL7NPAAMb1hHS7_WMeGegscny4d4DTH5RQfQqnnuy5IN6MX6_I) 

## What You'll get

### Salary Expectation

<!--
  - Be sure to specify an actual salary figure, or at least a range
  - Specify a current locale, such as GBP, USD, or CAD

  IMPORTANT: Posts that do not include a salary or range
  will receive a 'needs info' label
-->

- A competitive salary from the start and a raise to EUR 130,000 annually after only one year
- Full Time

### Benefits

- An international team of brilliant minds
- A working environment that makes this team stay and grow
- Enough time to make sure that every detail of your solution is perfect
- A flat organization and plenty of room for your ideas
- No scheduled meetings
- Family-friendly working hours, no deadlines, no overtime
- Support for relocation

### Location

<!--
  Please specify your job's policy on remote work (see README for details)
-->

- Berlin, Germany
- Remote

## What You'll do _(Job Description)_
### About this job

We are look­ing for smart, cre­at­ive developers with a solid the­or­et­ical background. Our team of developers con­sists of those with 15+ years of com­mer­cial experience in vari­ous fields, to fresh gradu­ates in Com­puter Sci­ence, Phys­ics, and Math­em­at­ics. A uni­versity degree or work experience with C++, together with a fresh and cre­at­ive prob­lem-solv­ing approach would be an excellent com­bin­a­tion for this role. As all of our recruit­ment steps are task-based, the selection is based on the skills demonstrated during our tests.

You will work largely inde­pend­ently and will be responsible for the whole range of activ­it­ies when implementing a new fea­ture. You should be able to look at a prob­lem from the user's perspective and dis­cuss abstract concepts with fel­low developers. We expect each of our developers to do archi­tec­ture, design, imple­ment­a­tion, cus­tomer feed­back, and bug fix­ing, rather than split­ting these activ­it­ies between sev­eral people. We thus put everyone in control of their own work.

At think-cell, there are no dead­lines and no sched­uled meet­ings. A fea­ture is ready to be released when you are con­vinced that you have imple­men­ted the best pos­sible solu­tion. Meet­ings take place as needed, with only the people who are actu­ally involved being required to be present. At any time in the pro­cess, ideas, sug­ges­tions, and cri­ti­cism from any­body in the hier­archy is wel­come and is ser­i­ously con­sidered. Your ideas are wel­come, even if they mean that we have to change a lot of code to make things better.

We have published sev­eral sci­entific art­icles in the areas of Arti­fi­cial Intel­li­gence and Com­puter Graph­ics and we will encourage you to do the same. We spon­sor vis­its to con­fer­ences and have close rela­tion­ships with uni­versit­ies and research insti­tutes in the U.S. and Ger­many.

think-cell encour­ages a healthy work-life bal­ance. We do not work at night or on week­ends.

We pay very com­pet­it­ive salar­ies and offer our developers EUR 130,000 annu­ally fol­low­ing one year of employ­ment. If necessary, we will go out of our way to help you relo­cate to Ber­lin and will do what we can to help you acquire a work per­mit. While you should be able to com­mu­nic­ate effectively in English, know­ing Ger­man is not required. Ger­man lan­guage courses can be arranged if desired.

## What You Need to Be Successful _(Skills)_

### Must Have
- C++ 
- Algorithms


### Relevant Experiences
In fact, we have several engineers who joined right after graduating from university. 

## About Our Company
think-cell is a fast-paced software company in Berlin, Germany, with a focus on developing graphics products that stand out from the crowd. More than 1,000,000 users worldwide rely on [our software](https://www.think-cell.com/en/product) for their daily business as it makes creating graphical presentations so much easier, faster, and more enjoyable. Among our customers are many renowned consulting companies and large international corporations.

We do not have to make compromises with regard to code quality and beauty, because think-cell is highly profitable. We are willing to go the extra mile to develop sophisticated algorithms and refine our user interface, and we are proud of our many happy customers. The fact that the company is owned and managed by seasoned computer scientists certainly contributes to a working environment that makes exceptional developers come and stay.

### About our soft­ware

Our focus is on busi­ness slides (as opposed to more art­ful applic­a­tions) because they offer great potential for auto­ma­tion of lay­out tasks that are tra­di­tion­ally per­formed by Power­Point users themselves. Chal­lenges are plenty: from a solid under­stand­ing of what makes a good lay­out and which guidelines are fol­lowed by humans who do manual lay­out, to algorithms that pro­duce an accept­able out­put fast enough for inter­act­ive slide design, to a graph­ical user inter­face that sup­ports our new, ori­ginal approach to slide lay­out in a way that is easy to under­stand yet unob­trus­ive, to solid tech­nical solu­tions for auto­matic bug report­ing and auto­matic updates, to com­pat­ib­il­ity with third-party soft­ware on the com­puters of half a mil­lion users.

Here are some highlights of what we have done.

**Lan­guage**

- Everything we do is C++. Even our customer portal is written in C++. There is some Assem­bler glue code where it is necessary, and our build scripts are written in Python, but other than that think-cell is all about C++.
- We closely track the latest ver­sions of our com­pilers, Visual C++ and Xcode, so we can always use the latest C++ stand­ard fea­tures as soon as they become avail­able.
- We fund the work­ing group for pro­gram­ming lan­guages of the Ger­man Insti­tute for Stand­ard­iz­a­tion (DIN). Some of our employ­ees are mem­bers of this com­mit­tee and vote in the inter­na­tional stand­ard­iz­a­tion process of ISO/IEC C++.
- We spon­sor the Stand­ard C++ Found­a­tion help­ing them to pro­mote the under­stand­ing and use of mod­ern Stand­ard C++ on all com­pilers and plat­forms.

**Lib­rary**

- We use Boost throughout our code, e.g., Boost—Spirit for pars­ing.
- We have our own range lib­rary, in the same spirit as Boost. Range or Eric Niebler’s range-v3, but going fur­ther, for example, by uni­fy­ing internal and external iter­a­tion. We gave a talk about it, and most of the code is pub­lic.
- We develop our own cross-plat­form lib­rary to sup­port Mac and Win­dows with a single code base.
- We have our own ref­er­ence-count­ing and per­sist­ence lib­rar­ies to save and restore whole object trees.
- We have an extens­ive bug report­ing infra­struc­ture. Asser­tions and error checks stay in the release code, and our soft­ware auto­mat­ic­ally reports bugs to our server. The server ana­lyzes the bug, cat­egor­izes it, and files it in a data­base that all developers can access. If an update fixes the bug, the user can down­load the update directly from a bug response web page.

**Algorithms**

- think-cell was foun­ded on the idea for an algorithm for auto­matic slide lay­out, and we are still on an excit­ing jour­ney towards that ambi­tious vis­ion. You can see our most recent release in action!
- We developed a new algorithm for auto­matic point cloud labeling that allows labels to be posi­tioned away from the actual points.
- We developed a new algorithm for auto­matic column chart labeling.
- We are work­ing with John For­rest – author of the lin­ear solver CLP – to make his sim­plex code faster on our kind of prob­lems.
- We developed many gen­eric data struc­tures that are not in C++ or Boost, for example par­ti­tions.
- Our software not only produces charts, it is also able to read them back from paper. For our chart recog­ni­tion tool, we rely on OpenCV and the Lepton­ica Image Pro­cess­ing Lib­rary.

**Reverse Engin­eer­ing**

- We do lots of reverse engin­eer­ing with the dis­as­sem­bler IDA from Hex-Rays, in order to achieve things that are not pos­sible via the doc­u­men­ted Microsoft Office API.
- We wrote prob­ably the best func­tion hook­ing engine out there. At each start of our soft­ware, we patch the Microsoft Office execut­ables in memory. Rather than hard-cod­ing patch addresses, we search for small chunks of assembly code to be robust against minor changes in the execut­ables.

## How to apply

Please apply via this link: [Click here to apply](https://www.think-cell.com/career/jobs/development?ec=rC0IZep7h7pmLcx8ndavN6CYqAqwS1w6rWJ8C30Q0MQcBTL97qhrOxn34Sklr6jQNODy_edu-fd-bsHwp3MXAOL7NPAAMb1hHS7_WMeGegscny4d4DTH5RQfQqnnuy5IN6MX6_I)

After you apply through the link, our team will reach out to you through e-mail.
If you have any questions, please contact our team via e-mail: hr@think-cell.com

---

## Meta

<!--
  These meta tickboxes automatically apply labels to your post
  Learn more in the README https://github.com/TechnologyMasters/jobs/blob/master/README.md#label-definitions

  Note, you must fill in the checkboxes correctly in order for them to appear as checked in Markdown

  Unfilled examples:
- [x] Contract
  - [ ] Full Time
  - [ x] Full Time
  - [x ] Full Time

  Filled example:
  - [x] Full Time
-->

- [x] Full Time
- [ ] Part Time
- [x] Internship
- [x] Remote Worldwide
- [x] Remote Regional

items.description:
